provenance: amithm3/shrutilipi (HF mirror of AI4Bharat Shrutilipi), config sa — REAL human Sanskrit (All India Radio). Public splits preserved; TEST NEVER FILTERED/TOUCHED.
text: Devanagari cleaned (punct/digits/latin→space, NFC) then SLP1-transliterated (core-native). The same cleaning is applied to every model's output at scoring time.
